task_completion.description: Agent logged into FreeMED using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (typically showing 'admin' as the logged-in user).

task_completion.description: Agent located and opened the patient record for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or profile for 'Maria Santos' is open and visible in the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct test name into a clinical record or lab result form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Hemoglobin A1c' or 'HbA1c' (case-insensitive) is typed into a relevant field in the patient's clinical record.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct lab value and units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '6.8' and the unit '%' are visible in the clinical record entry fields.

task_completion.description: Agent included today's date in the clinical record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date field or text entry within the clinical record shows the current date (matching the system date in the screenshots).

task_completion.description: Agent saved or submitted the clinical record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message of the saved record, or the newly added lab result appearing in the patient's historical clinical notes/records list.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the FreeMED web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED application, without terminal windows executing MySQL or API commands to insert the data.

integrity.description: Agent entered the information into the actual FreeMED application rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields for the lab result are clearly part of the FreeMED web interface (e.g., clinical notes, lab results module) and not a separate notepad or text application.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the record.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) are open and being used to modify the DOM to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Expected Lab Value: 6.8. Expected Units: %. Expected Test Name Keywords: 'a1c' or 'hemoglobin'. The agent must record this inside the FreeMED application via the GUI.
